input.command:
git add config/trust-firewall.yaml colmena-core/src/firewall.rs colmena-cli/tests/integration.rs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: blocked patterns now match actual commands, not commit messages

Replaced generic flag patterns with anchored command-specific patterns.
Prevents false positives when blocked keywords appear inside quoted
strings like commit messages or echo output.

Added tests: force push -f, reset with flag, commit message false positive.

built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
